English: Choose an output folder to build/export into.
Translation: Choose an output folder to build/export into.

English: Currently ignored. Android builds preserve original materials and shaders for live Quest shader testing.
Translation: Currently ignored. Android builds preserve original materials and shaders for live Quest shader testing.

English: Scenario export is a stub for now (metadata + icon + mod.json).
Translation: Scenario export is a stub for now (metadata + icon + mod.json).

English: Mod ID is the permanent machine-safe identifier for this mod.\nIf Create is enabled, the name is valid and safe to proceed with.
Translation: Mod ID is the permanent machine-safe identifier for this mod.\nIf Create is enabled, the name is valid and safe to proceed with.

English: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.
Translation: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.

English: Choose where to save this CatalogModProject asset.
Translation: Choose where to save this CatalogModProject asset.

English: INVALID Fix the failing rules below before creating the mod.
Translation: INVALID Fix the failing rules below before creating the mod.

English: VALID This Mod ID is ready to use.
Translation: VALID This Mod ID is ready to use.

English: Could not read that image file.
Translation: Could not read that image file.

English: No active SceneView camera found. Click in the Scene view and try again.
Translation: No active SceneView camera found. Click in the Scene view and try again.

English: When enabled, the SceneView skybox/background is replaced with pure black during icon capture. Scene geometry still renders normally.
Translation: When enabled, the SceneView skybox/background is replaced with pure black during icon capture. Scene geometry still renders normally.

English: Icon must be exactly {0}x{0}. Uploads that do not match will be rejected. Export is blocked without an icon.
Translation: Icon must be exactly {0}x{0}. Uploads that do not match will be rejected. Export is blocked without an icon.

English: Icon must be exactly {0}x{0}.\n\nSelected image is {1}x{2}.
Translation: Icon must be exactly {0}x{0}.\n\nSelected image is {1}x{2}.

English: Mark this content as Developer Content
Translation: Mark this content as Developer Content

English: Developer Content is hidden in-game unless Developer Mode is enabled. This is intended for test rigs, internal props, and mod-development utilities.
Translation: Developer Content is hidden in-game unless Developer Mode is enabled. This is intended for test rigs, internal props, and mod-development utilities.

English: Select an existing CatalogModProject asset, or click "Create New..." to start a new mod.\n\nThis asset is the source-of-truth for mod identity, versioning, icon, and export settings.
Translation: Select an existing CatalogModProject asset, or click "Create New..." to start a new mod.\n\nThis asset is the source-of-truth for mod identity, versioning, icon, and export settings.

English: Export is blocked until all errors are resolved.
Translation: Export is blocked until all errors are resolved.

English: Major resets Minor and Patch to 0. Minor resets Patch to 0. Patch increments only. No manual typing.
Translation: Major resets Minor and Patch to 0. Minor resets Patch to 0. Patch increments only. No manual typing.

English: Incrementing MAJOR indicates a breaking change.\n\nContinue?
Translation: Incrementing MAJOR indicates a breaking change.\n\nContinue?
